systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast Mon May 11 DPS not yet sent (arrives ~7:39 AM PT). Sun May 10 DPS still in mailbox but get_thread returns no parseable body — numbers require manual check in Toast app. (2) Sling May 12 daily report not yet sent (arrives ~7 AM PT). Most recent on file = Mon May 11: 2 staff (Rafael Patricio Cook, Katharine Brown Bartender), 5.75 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. (3) Reviews backlog: 6 unanswered. Deimos Somied 5★ (Google, May 10, 2 days old) top priority. Lisa O'Brien now 31 days old. (4) Google Ads: 2 reports received in 24h. No disapprovals, no budget alerts. (5) Yelp: only a marketing newsletter — no customer inquiry. (6) TripAdvisor: marketing email 'Connect with your diners—for free' — not an ad performance report. (7) Reservations: 0 today, 0 Wed. Next big party: Stephen McCandlish Fri May 15. (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
